name: Consumer Reports Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Green pepper, finely chopped (about 2/3 cup)
1 can (16 oz) red kidney beans with liquid.
1/4 cup Corn, frozen or leftover, or Canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef, garlic, onion, and green pepper in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat, stirring frequently to break up the meat.
2. Cook until onion is soft and meat has lost its pink color.
3. Add remaining ingredients.
4. Bring to a boil, cover, and reduce heat.
5. Simmer the chili for 45 minutes, stirring frequently.
MEATLESS CHILI (VERY GOOD)
1. Follow the basic recipe.
2. Omit the beef and water.
3. Use 1 tbsp vegetable oil to saute the garlic, onion, and green pepper.
4. Add 1 can (16 oz) of garbanzo beans and one can (16 oz) of pinto beans, undrained.
